title: September 16
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|September|hide31=yes}}
'''September 16''' is the 259th day of the year (260th in leap years). There are 106 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1940s#1949|1949]] – [[Ed Begley, Jr.]] is born.
*[[1950s#1955|1955]] – [[Dirk Yohan Beer]] is born.
*[[1998]] – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 33|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 33]] published.
*[[2003]] – ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]'' released on the [[Wikipedia:Personal computer|PC]] platform.
*[[2008]] – ''[[Order 66: A Republic Commando Novel]]'' published.
*2008 – ''[[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed]]'' released.
*[[2009]] – [[The Clone Wars 9|''The Clone Wars'' 9]] published.
*2009 – [[Knights of the Old Republic 45|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 45]] published.
*[[2011]] – ''[[LEGO Star Wars: The Padawan Menace]]'' released on Blu-Ray and DVD.
*2011 – "[[Water War]]" and "[[Gungan Attack]]" air on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2013]] – ''[[LEGO Minifigure Year by Year: A Visual History]]'' published.
*[[2014]] – [[Escape from Darth Vader (World of Reading)|''Escape from Darth Vader'']] published.
*[[2015]] – [[Lando 4|''Lando'' 4]] published.
*2015 – [[Star Wars (2015) 9|''Star Wars'' (2015) 9]] published.
*[[2020]] – [[Darth Vader (2020) 5|''Darth Vader'' (2020) 5]] published.
*2020 – [[Star Wars (2020) 6|''Star Wars'' (2020) 6]] published.
*2020 – "[[The Saga of Rey]]" published.
*[[2025]] – ''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia of Starfighters and Other Vehicles (second edition)]]'' published in the US.
<noinclude>
